hero.title: Stop digging through 40 folders{br}for your samples.
hero.subtitle: CrAIte organizes your samples by sound type and makes them accessible directly in your DAW.
hero.beforeAfterLabel: From this… to this, in seconds

howItWorks.title: 3 steps. Your samples are finally organized.
howItWorks.subtitle: No setup. No account. No cloud.
howItWorks.step1Desc: The app auto-detects your sample folders and projects. Nothing to configure.
howItWorks.step2Desc: CrAIte identifies your samples by filename and metadata. Hundreds classified in seconds.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Add "CrAIte Library" to your search paths. Kicks, snares, pads, vocals — everything is there, organized.

trust.title: Designed so you have nothing to worry about.
trust.subtitle: CrAIte doesn't move, modify, or collect anything.
trust.card1Desc: CrAIte creates a real folder structure on your disk, visible in your DAW's file browser. No plugin, no app to run alongside.
trust.card2Desc: CrAIte creates smart links (hardlinks) to your original samples. Zero extra disk space, your files stay where they are.
trust.card3Desc: Source code available (AGPL v3), no subscription, no account required. 100% local, no data leaves your PC.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: Yes, completely free. No hidden paid version, no subscription, no account required.
faq.a2: No. CrAIte creates links (hardlinks) to the original files. Nothing is copied or moved.
faq.a3: No. CrAIte never modifies original files. Your projects keep pointing to the same samples at the same locations.
faq.q4: What operating systems does CrAIte support?
faq.a4: CrAIte is available on Windows, macOS, and Linux. The app works the same way on all systems.

download.title: You have hundreds of samples{br}you never use.
download.subtitle: Not because they're bad. Because you can't find them.
download.cta: CrAIte organizes them all. In seconds. Directly in your DAW.
download.trackingCopied: Tracking ID copied — paste it in CrAIte settings to link your experience.

footer.tagline: Organizes your samples by sound type, directly in your DAW.
footer.copyright: © {year} CrAIte. Open source (AGPL v3). Free. 100% local.
